Module io.github.tonywasher.joceanus.gordianknot
Package io.github.tonywasher.joceanus.gordianknot.impl.core.spec.cipher

Class GordianCoreStreamKeySubType

java.lang.Object
io.github.tonywasher.joceanus.gordianknot.impl.core.spec.cipher.GordianCoreStreamKeySubType
public final class GordianCoreStreamKeySubType extends Object
Core StreamKey subType.
